author: .paulharris
content: well, validator clients would consume some things i think, and id prefer those dont break...

author: nflaig
content: you mean the events in 587? the only event that is used by validator clients in gloas (so far) is `execution_payload_available`

author: .paulharris
content: point being that any event consumed by a validator would be needing compatibility for us - if its non compatible would prefer we just go v2 and move on

author: .paulharris
content:
https://ethereum.github.io/beacon-APIs/?urls.primaryName=dev#/Beacon/getPoolPayloadAttestations just looking at the api, theres a `version` field in the pool response? it should be using the `eth-consensus-header` not having a version field in the output to my understanding...

seems like `pool/attester_slashings` has `version` too, but most don't...
